listings.title: Full Day Wedding Photography
listings.description: Complete coverage of your wedding day from preparations to reception. Includes 500+ hand-edited images delivered in 4 weeks.
listings.seoTitle: Full Day Wedding Photography Colombo | Lumina Studios
listings.seoDescription: Professional full-day wedding photography in Colombo, Sri Lanka. 500+ edited images, cinematic style, island-wide coverage.
listings.contentMarkdown:
## What's Included

- 10 hours of coverage
- 2 photographers
- 500+ hand-edited images
- Online gallery
- High-resolution downloads

## Timeline

Delivery within 4–6 weeks of your wedding date.

## Why Choose Us

With 5+ years of experience, we specialise in natural, emotional storytelling photography.

listings.title: Pre-Wedding Shoot
listings.description: Relaxed 3-hour outdoor or studio shoot for couples. Perfect for save-the-date cards and social announcements.
listings.seoTitle: Pre-Wedding Photography Sri Lanka | Lumina Studios
listings.seoDescription: Affordable pre-wedding photography packages in Sri Lanka. Outdoor and studio shoots available island-wide.
listings.contentMarkdown:
## Session Details

- 3 hours of shooting
- 2 outfit changes
- 100+ edited images
- Location scouting assistance

## Popular Locations

Galle Fort, Negombo Beach, Botanical Gardens, Custom locations on request.

listings.title: Cinematic Wedding Film
listings.description: A cinematic 5–8 minute highlight film of your wedding day. Shot in 4K with aerial drone footage where permitted.
listings.seoTitle: Cinematic Wedding Films Sri Lanka | Lumina Studios
listings.seoDescription: Cinematic wedding films shot in 4K with drone footage. Island-wide coverage, 5–8 min highlight reels.
